description: Output schema for preparing the q1_partner_import batch for CRM import.

field_types.clean_contact_id: string; use the winning source row_id
field_types.source_row_id: string; use the winning source row_id
field_types.company_name: string from the winning source row
field_types.contact_name: string from the winning source row
field_types.email: string; normalized email or empty string
field_types.phone: string; normalized digits-only phone or empty string
field_types.source_name: enum: badge_scan, sponsor_form, partner_upload, webinar_form, exhibitor_form, manual_upload
field_types.captured_at: string; ISO timestamp from the winning row

duplicate_summary.duplicate_key_format: email:<normalized_email> when normalized email exists; otherwise phone_company:<normalized_phone>:<normalized_company_name>

campaign_member_import.count: integer; number of surviving cleaned contacts that should be imported as members of the batch campaign
campaign_member_import.source_label: string; use the batch source_system value as the import source label
